_publications._publicationTitle: Vinblastine/Methotrexate for Debilitating and Progressive Plexiform Neurofibroma in Children and Young Adults with Neurofibromatosis Type 1: A Phase 2 Study.

_contextSnippet: Of the 23 evaluable participants, at final follow up on protocol therapy, there were no partial responses observed. Twenty participants (87%) had SD on 2D imaging, and three participants (13%) had PD
resourceName: Response Evaluation in Neurofibromatosis and Schwannomatosis (REiNS)
details: Used for 2D imaging response assessment; 20 participants (87%) had stable disease, 3 participants (13%) had progressive disease, no partial responses observed
